content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Fire Storm
description: A Maliwan spell grenade that hits harder than most of the other thrown spells, sending a fireball forward before calling down a cluster of follow-up impacts. It is strongest in tight spaces where the initial hit and the falling meteors can overlap, but the large splash makes it dangerous to use up close.
notes: Its red text nods to Tim the Enchanter from Monty Python and the Holy Grail.

special.description: Launches a fireball straight ahead that explodes on impact, then calls down four meteors that strike the ground for incendiary damage. Grenades regenerate over time.
special.title: What manner of man are you that can summon up fire without flint or tinder?
